tags.name: Comment
tags.description: Endpoints for managing individual comments and replies

tags.name: Post
tags.description: Endpoints for managing posts and interactions

tags.name: Feedback
tags.description: Endpoints for submitting and managing feedback

tags.name: Itinerary
tags.description: Endpoints for managing itineraries and trip items

put.description: Updates an existing user's information by their unique ID.

delete.description: Deletes a user account from the system by their unique ID.

get.summary: Get a single post by ID
Get a single travel notebook by ID
Get a single location by ID
Get detailed info (content) for a location

put.summary: Update detailed info (content) for a location

get.summary: Get a single itinerary by ID

delete.summary: Remove a specific trip item from an itinerary
Remove member from group (Automatically kicks from Chat)

get.summary: Get a single comment by ID

get.description: Retrieves a list of all registered users.

post.description: Creates a new user account based on the provided request.

post.summary: Admin handles a report (e.g., approve, reject)

get.summary: Get saved posts for the current user
Get root comments for a post (paginated)

post.summary: Create a new root comment on a post

get.summary: Get all trip items for an itinerary

post.summary: Add a trip item to an itinerary

get.summary: Get all expenses for the itinerary

post.summary: Add an expense to the itinerary
Create a new group (Automatically creates General chat channel)
Add member to group (Automatically syncs to Chat)
Admin responds to a user's feedback
Create a reply for a comment
Perform a moderation action on a user (e.g., BAN, WARN)

get.description: Retrieves the profile information of the currently authenticated user.

get.summary: Get all travel notebooks for this itinerary

password.description: New password for the users (leave empty to keep current password)

avatarUrl.description: URL to the users's avatar image

roles.description: List of role names assigned to the users

items.description: List of role names assigned to the users

UserUpdateRequest.description: Request payload for updating a users's profile

hashtags.description: Set of hashtags for the post (from Post_hashtag table)

items.description: Set of hashtags for the post (from Post_hashtag table)

media_url.description: Media file's url of the blog

itinerary_id.description: UUID of the Itinerary this post is linked to (from Create_post table)

is_liked.description: Users hiện tại đã thích comment này chưa

post_id.description: ID của bài post chứa comment này

parent_comment_id.description: ID của comment cha (null nếu là comment gốc)

reply_count.description: Tổng số reply của comment này

latest_replies.description: Danh sách một vài reply mới nhất (ví dụ: 2 reply)

description.description: Description or content of the notebook
description.example: List of must-try dishes and restaurants.

itinerary_id.description: UUID of the itinerary this notebook belongs to

content.description: Detailed information or description of the location (from Location_info table)
content.example: One of the most beautiful beaches in Da Nang.

content.description: Detailed content for the location (e.g., HTML, Markdown)

name.example: Dinner at Hai San Be Man

description.example: A 5-day trip to explore beaches and food in Da Nang.

start_date.description: Start date and time of the trip (ISO 8601 format)

end_date.description: End date and time of the trip (ISO 8601 format)

people_quantity.description: Number of people in the trip

budget_estimate.description: Estimated budget for the trip (e.g., in VND)

themes.description: Set of themes for the itinerary (from Itinerary_theme table)

items.description: Set of themes for the itinerary (from Itinerary_theme table)

group_id.description: UUID of the group this itinerary belongs to

start_time.description: Start time of this specific trip item (ISO 8601 format)

duration.description: Duration of the activity in minutes

note.description: A note for this trip item

location_id.description: UUID of the Location for this trip item

avatar.description: URL of the group's avatar image

theme_color.description: Hex color code for group theme

content.description: The text content of the comment

content_id.description: ID of the reported content (Post ID, Comment ID, Users ID, etc.)

report_type.description: Reason for reporting (from the Report_to table)

status.description: The new status of the report

description.description: Admin's private notes on why this action was taken
description.example: Users has been warned. Report closed.

is_leader.description: Set this member as a group leader

member_id.description: UUID of the users to be added to the group

location_id.description: The UUID of the Location being suggested

notes.description: Optional notes about why this location is suggested
notes.example: This place looks great for our first day!

content.example: The app crashes when opening the map.

description.description: The admin's reply content to the users
description.example: Thank you for your feedback! We are looking into this issue.

message_content.description: Short text content of the replied message

message_type.description: Type of the message (e.g., TEXT, IMAGE)

media_url.description: Media URL when message_type is IMAGE

share_post_url.description: Post URL when message_type is SHARE_POST

parent_message_id.description: ID of the message being replied to (if any)
ID of the message being replied to (if any)

userId.description: The unique ID of the users receiving the action

note.description: Admin's justification or notes for this action
note.example: Users violated community guidelines multiple times.
